deviations.what: Composite data-type binding paradigm: the Currency type is pulled in via core:require and every Input/Text binds a composite parts:['/amount','/currency'] with type:'CurrencyType' plus formatOptions (showMeasure/showNumber/preserveDecimals/currencyCode/style) 1:1. The two model fields amount ('123456789.123') and currency ('USD') are serialized by abap2UI5 as /AMOUNT and /CURRENCY; the paths are generated via _bind (never hardcoded).
